title: Calvin's Client
description: Client-side quality of life pack that enhances environmental immersion, GUI/HUD tactility, while retaining Vanilla's charm and server compatibility.
body:
![Calvin Client](https://i.imgur.com/l0NoqOj.png) Calvin's Client is a modpack that aims to enhance the Vanilla experience while maintaining compatibility with Vanilla multiplayer. From your environment to your inventory, and GUI to HUD, this pack makes Minecraft feel a little for tactile an immersive while keeping the Vanilla Minecraft charm. Notable Features:

Of course [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) alongside with [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) are present, aiming to optimize and shaderize this pack. [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) opens the players view to a new age of Minecraft exploration, but don't get lost with [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)! [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) and [Ambient Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) are a few of sound enhancement mods that makes caves do cave stuff and birds do bird stuff. [Client Sort](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsort) and [Tiny Item Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiny-item-animations?version=1.21.5&loader=fabric)(Awaiting update) make sorting the dump chest a lot more satisfying. Comes paired with [Complementary](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) and [BSL](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) shaders, as they are compatible with Distant Horizons.
